name: Temporary Voice Channels
author: your-github-username
description: Creates managed temporary voice channels with icon-based naming, auto cleanup, and hub-managed runtime configuration.

permissions.label: Read voice state
permissions.description: Read voice channel joins, leaves, moves, and occupancy.

permissions.label: Move members
permissions.description: Move members from the lobby into temporary managed channels.

permissions.label: Read members
permissions.description: Read member voice state for move and tracking logic.

botCommands.name: voice-room
botCommands.description: Open the icon selector for your temporary voice room.

descriptionLocalizations.de: Open the icon selector for your temporary voice room.

configFields.label: Enable temporary voice channels
configFields.description: Master switch for temporary voice channel automation.

configFields.label: Lobby voice channel ID
configFields.description: Joining this voice channel creates a temporary managed channel.

configFields.label: Temporary voice category ID
configFields.description: Category where temporary managed channels are created.

configFields.label: Default channel icon
configFields.description: Preferred icon for new channels when available (for example 🔵).

configFields.label: Default channel name
configFields.description: Base name appended after the icon for generated channels.

configFields.label: Maximum managed channels
configFields.description: Upper limit for concurrently managed temporary channels.

configFields.label: Enable icon rename menu
configFields.description: Allow icon changes through the interactive select menu.

configFields.label: Enable voice activity tracking
configFields.description: Track voice activity duration separately from channel lifecycle logic.

installNotes: Configure lobbyChannelId and temporaryVoiceCategoryId in Admin before enabling automation.
